name: @pryzm/ui-base
description: PRYZM 2 — Phase B.1 (S73-WIRE) panel base class. Owns `Panel` — the lifecycle base that every `src/ui/*` panel will extend during Phase B.2..B.40 constructor widening. Holds the typed `runtime` field, the `mount/render/unmount/dispose` lifecycle, and the `pryzm.ui.<panel>.{mount,render,unmount}` OTel spans. The white UI imports only this package and `@pryzm/runtime-composer/types`; per the Phase H lint rule (`no-runtime-package-import`) no other `@pryzm/*` import is allowed from `src/ui/`.
